reference: Hi. This can be a small abscess or a hemangioma. It can be a pyogenic granuloma. It is better to take a course of antibiotics for three days and see the results. If it is recurrent, it is better to have it surgically removed.
text: Hi. This can be a small abscess or a hemangioma; it can be a pyogenic range forming. It is better to take a course of antibiotics for 3 days and see the results. If it is recurrent, it is better to have it surgically removed.
